title: Operate specialised machinery and equipment
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate specialised machinery and equipment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Select and prepare specialised machinery and equipment for use

pcs.text: Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Source and interpret relevant specialised machinery and equipment operation and maintenance manual and manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and interpret relevant specialised machinery and equipment operation and maintenance manual and manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and interpret relevant specialised machinery and equipment operation and maintenance manual and manufacturer instructions.

pcs.text: Assess the work site and confirm the suitability of the specialised machinery and equipment for the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the work site and confirm the suitability of the specialised machinery and equipment for the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the work site and confirm the suitability of the specialised machinery and equipment for the task.

pcs.text: Select specialised machinery and equipment suitable for the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select specialised machinery and equipment suitable for the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select specialised machinery and equipment suitable for the task.

pcs.text: Select and maintain personnel protective equipment applicable to the machinery and equipment to be operated and the task to be undertaken
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and maintain personnel protective equipment applicable to the machinery and equipment to be operated and the task to be undertaken?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and maintain personnel protective equipment applicable to the machinery and equipment to be operated and the task to be undertaken.

pcs.text: Fit and use personal protective equipment according to workplace procedures and job requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fit and use personal protective equipment according to workplace procedures and job requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fit and use personal protective equipment according to workplace procedures and job requirements.

pcs.text: Conduct routine pre-operational checks as described in operation and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct routine pre-operational checks as described in operation and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct routine pre-operational checks as described in operation and maintenance manual.

pcs.text: Replace and report damaged or worn components in line with workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Replace and report damaged or worn components in line with workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Replace and report damaged or worn components in line with workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Attach ancillary equipment and check for correct operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Attach ancillary equipment and check for correct operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Attach ancillary equipment and check for correct operation.
